posts.cooked:
Ok, I have been browsing the MBN downloads, sacred carrot, emerald moon base etc and the things you can get are truly amazing! Change the text, change the font of the text, story coder, LBArchitect, programs to view all files in hqrs and pack in your own stuff to overwrite, etc. With all this, Im decided: Im going to make a completely new version of LBA2. All buildings different. Completely new story. I think its highly possible, if I work hard enough. You people may think I do not know enough! But here, in great britain, we respect intelligence and good spirit! higher voice And so whether the MBN will support me or not I will make this project come true!

*walks off*

Hey, nice to see your enthusiasms in this modifications and also thanks for the compliments

I think choosing LBA2 to make a new version isnt a good choice. Simply because we dont have tools enough to make something really different in LBA2 besides new room designs and some limited scene definitions.

I suggest you to make such thing for LBA1 which are better reversed and well-known. Also you have lots of tools to change it.

Other thing is that you could for example help one of the LBA modification projects, like TGR. Well I dont mean Prequel because were not accepting more people yet, and maybe TGR have any task for you in this matter.

Anyway, youre free to do what you want and think you could do, this was just an advice of someone who also help developing some of the tools

Join the LBA Prequel project instead

Just kidding, good luck
This can be the LBA Sequel.

Lol good idea
I cant join LBA Prequel or (I doubt) anything else, as I need a program to do everything for me
Also, thanks for your advice - I noticed there were many more tools for LBA1, but I dont have the game

Unfortunately the main tasks in Prequel are full at the moment, but this doesnt mean, we in future, wont need extra help. At the current stage we have enough people for now.

Anyway, you can still play around and make funny things of this, not necessary make an huge project.
Hmm I think you should join rebellion
no join the lba rebellion prequel
Its only me or you people actually dont believe in this projects?

- Plasma: What can you do?

Maybe you can indeed get into the LBA: The Great Rebellion Team. Were still in need of people.

Well I have basic webskills (but you already have a website), absolutely pure genious forum-creating-modding-andstuff skills (but you already use the MBN), can come up with stupid ideas and thats just about it :P.

I cant really help you
Everyone could actually help if they make for that.
- Plasma: Are you any good at graphic design?

alexfont:

Well, in the first place, why should I believe anything?
Does it actually matter if people believe it will ever finished? LBA2 is almost 10 years old and were still here. Isnt that enough proof for anything?
It doesnt matter if the projects will ever get finished, just that people are working on it and with regular status reports of what (cool) things were accomplished is more than enough for most of us.
